title: Archived Human Tissue Collection 1999-Aug 2015 -- University of Minnesota TMCs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"71m90","text":"Liver and adipose tissue samples obtained from the UMN Biospecimen Repository that were collected and stored between 1999 and August 2015 not have documented collection protocols. This protocol includes the relevant information that was recorded at sample collection.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Adipose and liver samples collected and stored between 1999 - Aug. 2015 do not have a record of tissue collection. The following information was documented and is available for each tissue: - Date and time of collection - Processed time - Age - Ethnicity - Race - Gender - Material group and type - Volume - Vial modifiers - Pathology diagnosis - QC tissue status and diagnosis
creator: Allie Abdellatif
